# Timing / Rhythm

| Method Code | Short Code | Canonical Name | Definition / What to try | Mechanism | Minimum Viable Experiment | Primary Metrics |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| TIM-001 | PSP | Predictive Semantic Priming | Show compressed meaning 200–400 ms before the speaker lands it. | Reduces prediction load and primes interpretation. | Pre-cue vs sync vs post-cue. | Gist recall; smoothness; effort |
| TIM-002 | SLSB | Sync-Locked Semantic Beat | Show the overlay exactly when the semantic beat is spoken. | Preserves audio-text relation. | Sync vs pre/post. | Comprehension; preference |
| TIM-003 | PCC | Post-Cue Confirmation | Display a summary immediately after the sentence. | Acts as recap rather than preview. | Post-cue vs sync. | Delayed recall; completion |
| TIM-004 | PWC | Pause-Window Captioning | Place heavier text only during speech pauses or low-action moments. | Avoids competing with important audiovisual input. | Same overlay during speech vs pauses. | Visual recall; effort |
| TIM-005 | BAC | Breath-Aligned Captions | Use natural speech breaths to segment caption events. | Matches human prosody and reduces rush. | Breath-aligned vs uniform timing. | Comfort; completion |
| TIM-006 | CLR | Cut-Locked Reveal | Reveal caption on visual cut or camera movement boundary. | Uses visual reset for attention capture. | Cut-locked vs mid-shot reveal. | First fixation; recall |
| TIM-007 | MEG | Minimum Exposure Guardrail | No caption shorter than 0.8 sec except one-word impact beats. | Respects reading timing constraints. | Min duration on/off variants. | Missed caption rate; effort |
| TIM-008 | MRR | Micro-Rest Rhythm | Insert brief no-text gaps between semantic beats. | Lets eyes return to video and reduces continuous reading. | Continuous text vs micro-rest. | Visual recall; effort; completion |
| TIM-009 | ABS | Attentional-Blink Spacing | Avoid presenting two critical words within 200–500 ms. | Prevents rapid target competition. | Critical words close vs spaced. | Second-keyword recall |
| TIM-010 | TMD | Tempo-Matched Density | Decrease word count as speech tempo rises. | Keeps reading load stable. | Fixed density vs tempo-adaptive. | Gist recall; effort |
| TIM-011 | CRP | Caption Refractory Period | After an emphasized word, hold visual quiet for a beat. | Gives consolidation time. | Immediate next text vs refractory gap. | Keyword recall; completion |
| TIM-012 | LFMS | Last-Frame Memory Stamp | Hold final takeaway for the last 0.8–1.5 sec. | Supports post-view recall and saves. | With/without final stamp. | Delayed recall; saves |
| TIM-013 | LCC | Loop Callback Caption | End with a phrase that reinterprets the opening hook. | Improves narrative closure and rewatch. | Callback vs generic ending. | Completion; rewatch |
| TIM-014 | SAC | Speed-Adaptive Captions | Detect playback speed or speech rate and adjust overlay density. | Personalizes load. | Manual fast/slow variants. | Comprehension by speech rate |
| TIM-015 | OBS | On-Beat Silence | Use no text during important sounds, laughs, or music drops. | Prevents text from flattening audio moments. | Text during sound vs no text + sound cue. | Enjoyment; comprehension |
